title: lobelia ehrenbergii subsp. gracilens
intro: Lobelia ehrenbergii subsp. gracilens, also known as Lobelia gracilens, is a flowering plant species belonging to the family Campanulaceae. It is an annual or perennial herb with medicinal properties, traditionally used in herbal medicine to treat various health conditions. The plant's extracts have been found to possess anti-inflammatory, antispasmodic, and expectorant properties, which may help alleviate respiratory issues, reduce pain, and promote relaxation. Lobelia gracilens can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and is often used in herbal remedies to support lung health, relieve stress, and promote overall well-being.
